Re-derivation 2026-06-02: pure-C without forbidden DImode chain bottoms at sandbox distance 9 (build_insns 81 matches target, but 9 register-rotation+scheduling diffs persist). The 4 regfix substs at @50/@56 (ddiu->addu, zero,-1->0,zero,  eq->bne, s0,v0->v0,zero) themselves manufacture the FORBIDDEN goto-end+ret_val accumulator pattern (per goto-end-prologue-delay-slot.md archive): the cheat-free source's natural 'if (count == -1) return 0' is semantically equivalent to target's accumulator-based 'v0=0; goto check; v0=-1; check: if (v0!=0) return 0' but produces different bytes (li v0,-1 in the beqz delay slot + beq s0,v0 post-loop). Sibling func_80080258 and func_80080390 in same file have the IDENTICAL DImode chain + register-asm pin — they're also committed cheats under the new policy and need their own re-derivation. Resume avenues: (1) directed permuter from clean target (similar to cpu_side_move_dir_4 session 10) — high effort, low expected yield given the prior allocation-tie evidence on cpu_side_move_dir_4/marionation_Exec; (2) project-wide rodata layout change if the function's data adjacency suggests TU re-attribution (per jtbl-rodata-split-infrastructure evidence checklist); (3) instrumented cc1 (tmp/gccdbg with ALLOCDBG) probe to identify the SPECIFIC priority-flip C lever needed — same approach as cpu_side_move_dir_4 sessions 5-9 with the chain-extender finding (legitimate-form unclear). register-rotation wall — carries 1 cheat-asm barrier (asm volatile("" : "=r"(t0) : "0"(t0));). Source removal causes GCC to coalesce t0+t1 into same register (s0) since t0 dies at func_80036F28(t0) before t1 is born. Target wants t0 in s0 (sequential with ret_a) and t1 in s1 (sequential with t0_2). Tested in session 2026-06-06: (a) sibling-style single-variable reuse (s0=t0/ret_a, s1=t1/t0_2) produces structurally identical asm but with 3-way register rotation (arg0→s2 not s3, frame_off→s1 not s2, t1→s3 not s1); (b) adding explicit frame_off local for arg0+ret_a didn't shift allocation. The barrier forces t0 alive past t1's birth, blocking coalesce. No pure-C source structure tested extends t0's natural lifetime past func_80036F28(t0) without semantic invention. No semantic use of t0 exists after that point; combine-folded uses (t0-t0, t0&0, 0x5E+(t0-t0)) all collapse before flow.c. Resume avenues: (1) instrumented cc1 ALLOCDBG to confirm exact priority ordering — may reveal pseudo number / decl-order lever; (2) directed permuter from clean single-function target with PERM_GENERAL on variable decl order / type. NOT canonical-asm-candidate (thin wrapper, no GTE/BIOS/HW).

CARVE-OUT FAILS BOTH PRONGS (investigated 2026-06-08 per .claude/rules/legitimate-volatile-interrupt-touched.md). PRONG 1 (IRQ writer): D_800A2D14 is written by func_80088740() (src/main.c:1505, SPU init from spu_InitEx), func_800892F8() (src/main.c:1677, SPU shutdown from ings2.c:720), AND by md_game_check_change_main_mode_katinuki itself (src/main.c:2286/2310, fade-pending save/restore). None are installed via SysSetCallback/VSyncCallback/InterruptCallback. The SPU IRQ handler installed via bios_OpenEvent(0xF0000009)+spu_SetCallback(&g_snd_irq_data) is g_snd_irq_data NOT a writer of D_800A2D14. func_800892F8 uses EnterCriticalSection but is invoked from main-loop code (ings2.c:720) - the critical section wraps the WRITER not an IRQ HANDLER. Address 0x800A2D14 is RAM, not MMIO 0x1F8xxxxx. CONCLUSION: D_800A2D14 is a plain main-loop game-state global tracking fade-pending value; NOT IRQ-touched. PRONG 2 (use-site construct): target asm at 0x8008A9E4-0x8008AA0C shows two adjacent lui+lw of D_800A2D14 with NO intervening function call (just beqz+delay-slot s3_flag=1 between them). This is NOT 'double-read-across-sequence-point' which requires x=G; foo(); y=G; with foo() as a real sequence point. NOT spin-wait (no loop). NOT IRQ-mutated-loop-bound. CONCLUSION: use-site does not match any of the three sanctioned shapes. BOTH criteria fail. HEAD's 'extern volatile s32 D_800A2D14;' at src/main.c:64 is a cheat-by-spelling under the expanded catalog (CSE-defeat on a non-IRQ global). The function stays INCOMPLETE. To reach COMPLETED-C requires finding a pure-C structure that forces GCC to re-load D_800A2D14 between the !=0 test and the store WITHOUT volatile - or canonical-asm authorization (since the construct is GCC's CSE folding a tested value into its store, no pure-C lever has been found).
